issue_title: videoLinkContainer width doesn't go smaller then 339px
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**

videoLinkContainer width doesn't go smaller then 339px

Messes up the navigation bar under 339px, as the navigation bar gets smaller due to webpage width, videoLinkContainer will not budge under 339px making any device under 339px annoying to use (Mobile S - 320px)

**To
test_description_zh: 将浏览器窗口宽度调整到320px（Mobile S尺寸），观察首页中videoLinkContainer元素的宽度表现以及导航栏的布局情况。
expected_result_zh: 当浏览器窗口宽度缩小到320px甚至更小时，videoLinkContainer的宽度应随页面宽度自适应缩小，不会出现超出屏幕或固定不变的情况；导航栏在该宽度下应正常显示，布局不错乱，页面可正常使用无水平滚动条。
